exceptions.reason: The API must access its dedicated rootless Podman socket whose mapped ownership is established at runtime.
mitigations: The service is hosted by a dedicated unprivileged account.
Application authorization limits workload operations to approved groups.

exceptions.reason: The workload API provisions approved templates through its dedicated rootless Podman service.
mitigations: Only the dedicated account socket is mounted.
Templates and allowed groups are centrally constrained.
